rules.rule: Detect: type-safety regressions, unsafe casts, any/unknown leakage; unnecessary optionality; missing error handling on awaited promises; misuse of process.exit / fs operations.
Critical review: 21-phase state machine — flag any phase that mutates state inconsistently, broken terminal conditions, missed phase transitions, or unbounded loops.
Critical review: spawn timeout handling, partial-write cleanup on failure, JSON parsing of newline-delimited streams, retry loop correctness.
Critical review: argument parsing security (no shell injection), proper defaults, dry-run guarantees no subprocess side effects.
All Zod schemas must use .strict() or .strip() consistently; required fields must use z.string().min(1) etc; rejects must produce actionable error messages.
